title: News Anchor's Mouth Moved But Robot Voice Came Out
description: In 2014, every recording device in Houston failed during four minutes of impossible broadcast horror. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 2014: Robot Voice Hijacked Live TV But All Cameras Failed...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Every recording device in Houston stopped working during the KPRC broadcast. Witnesses describe a robotic voice speaking through the anchor's mouth, giving coordinates to a place that doesn't exist. Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
Robot voice hijacked news anchor

Every camera in Houston failed for exactly four minutes during the morning broadcast. The only witnesses heard robotic speech coming from the anchor's moving lips, providing GPS coordinates to nowhere.
